title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 513.235 - Sale, how conducted
text:
513.235.  Sale, how conducted. — All property taken in execution by any officer shall be exposed to sale on the day for which it is advertised, between the hours of nine in the forenoon and five in the afternoon, publicly, by auction, for ready money, and the highest bidder shall be the purchaser.
(RSMo 1939 § 1366) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1202; 1919 § 1653; 1909 § 2222
